name: Crave Restaurant
description: A stylish, trendy hotspot directly across from Yaya Centre. Famous for gourmet burgers, loaded masala fries, and their signature San Sebastian cheesecake.

name: Kahvalti Cafe
description: An aesthetic, Instagrammable lobby gem on Lenana Road specializing in rich Mediterranean dishes and loaded all-day brunch platters.

name: Arabian Palace
description: Traditional palatial Middle Eastern dining experience serving slow-cooked aromatic chicken mandi rice, grilled kebabs, and hot mint tea.

name: Ayeyo Restaurant
description: An authentic Somali diner bringing the taste of home to Nairobi. Incredible portions of seasoned basmati rice, tender goat meat, and signature spiced bananas.

name: Habibi Haven
description: A cozy, beautifully lit modern lounge serving fresh shawarma wraps, classic hummus bowls, falafel skewers, and cool refreshing lemonades.

name: Flame Burger
description: High-speed flame-grilled smash burgers, hot seasoned potato wedges, and creamy vanilla milkshakes built for central Nairobi commuters.

name: The Garden
description: A lush garden sanctuary tucked away in Karen. Offers exquisite continental dishes, wood-fired artisanal pan pizzas, and custom specialty coffee mocktails.

name: The Posh Plate
description: High-end fine dining experience featuring premium hand-rolled pasta, rich cream sauces, truffle oil appetizers, and an unmatched private ambiance.

name: Mint & Salt
description: A minimalist, contemporary cafe serving freshly brewed coffees, savory breakfast waffles, and crisp customized seasonal salads.

name: Friends Restaurant
description: A highly rated neighborhood social staple serving massive portions of hot ugali, wet-fry fish, stewed beef, and traditional kienyeji greens.
